name.title: Domain Name
name.description: The domain name for this slave instance

mail-server-host.title: Mail Server Host
mail-server-host.description: The mail server host (IPv6 or IPv4) for this domain

mail-server-port.title: Mail Server Port
mail-server-port.description: The mail server port for this domain

authentication.title: Authentication Method
authentication.description: How this domain authenticates to the relay for outbound mail. 'none' uses IP-based host verification, 'password' uses SASL username/password.
